subcodes.first_line: In this day the hands of the chosen ones are upraised unto the heaven of bounty of the Bestower of gifts, and from Him do they seek deliverance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز ایادی اولیا  لسماء  عنایت واهب العطایا مرتفع و از او فرج میطلبند و
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action
